entities.description: A type of molecular marker used for screening and mapping traits

entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with a particular phenotypic trait

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHIC MARKERS
entities.description: A variation at a single position in a DNA sequence used for genotyping

entities.description: An experimental design used to reduce variability in pot experiments

entities.name: BIOMASS
